name: phosphatidylserine
mechanism: Membrane phospholipid involved in neuronal membrane structure, signaling, and apoptosis-related membrane dynamics; supplemental use is usually framed around membrane support and stress-response modulation rather than a single receptor target.
contraindications: stronger at product level than molecule-specific level)
cholinergic agents (no strong direct interaction retained).
summary: Membrane phospholipid involved in neuronal membrane structure, signaling, and apoptosis-related membrane dynamics; supplemental use is usually framed around membrane support and stress-response modulation rather than a single receptor target.
